Fixes the issue with malformed metadata and incorrect key names. This was made to make certain Flux2-Klein models importable into Draw Things.app, but it should also address the issue with LoRAs not fusing anything in Draw Things and MFLUX. It takes a single argument: the input file, and outputs a new file with `-FIXED` appended to the filename (extension remains .safetensors)
